criteria.description: Clip split operation creates valid left/right clips with contiguous timeline spans and correct source in-points.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c; core/src/timeline.zig splitClip tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Covers SC-001 and split edge rejection.

criteria.description: Clip trim operation updates timeline start, source in-point, and duration while rejecting invalid trims.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c; trimClip tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Invalid zero/negative duration trims are covered by rollback-safe tests.

criteria.description: Clip move operation updates timeline placement and compatible track assignment.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c and WP02 merged in 14f8423; moveClip and project save/load tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Covers track/time movement plus persistence of edited placement.

criteria.description: Timeline summaries are deterministic in track, time, and clip ID order.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c; deterministic summary ordering tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Qt redraw consumes core summaries rather than owning sort order.

criteria.description: Invalid track placements are rejected clearly without corrupting timeline state.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c and WP03 merged in d9b6ba1; incompatible move and ABI status tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Covers explicit invalid/out-of-range statuses across core and C ABI.

criteria.description: General keyframe model exists with opacity as the first scalar property.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c; KeyframeProperty.opacity, ScalarKeyframe, setScalarKeyframe, and opacity keyframe tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Transform, color, subtitle styling, blend amount, and transition parameters remain future properties.

criteria.description: Opacity keyframes interpolate and evaluate between points.
criteria.evidence: WP01 merged in 768463c and WP03 merged in d9b6ba1; evaluateScalarKeyframes and pontificate_project_evaluate_clip_opacity tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Linear and hold interpolation behavior is covered, including split-boundary preservation.

criteria.description: Keyframes save and load with project JSON.
criteria.evidence: WP02 merged in 14f8423; project JSON round-trip tests preserve opacity_keyframes under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Covers SC-004 keyframe persistence and evaluation after reload.

criteria.description: Older schema-1 project files without keyframe arrays still load.
criteria.evidence: WP02 merged in 14f8423; old schema-1 JSON compatibility test passes under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Clips load with empty opacity keyframe curves when the field is absent.

criteria.description: C ABI exposes Qt-facing split, trim, move, opacity keyframe set, and opacity evaluation calls.
criteria.evidence: WP03 merged in d9b6ba1; core/include/pontificate_core.h exposes the editing functions and ABI tests pass under zig build test.
criteria.notes: Docs in WP05 also compare the function names against the header.

criteria.description: Qt shell exposes first-pass controls for split, trim, move, opacity keyframes, and redraw behavior.
criteria.evidence: WP04 merged in 884add1; cmake --build build passes and timeout 3s env QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen ./build/pontificate started the GUI event loop without crashing.
criteria.notes: Full interactive GUI editing smoke was not performed in this headless session; code/build/offscreen launch evidence confirms the controls are wired and launchable.

criteria.description: CLI exposes a headless validation and inspection path for timeline edits and opacity keyframes.
criteria.evidence: WP02 merged in 14f8423 and WP05 commit 25e70ae corrected the public CLI summary; zig build run reports timeline_edit_ops=split,trim,move keyframes=opacity.
criteria.notes: Saved-project inspect output includes clip placement and opacity evaluation.

criteria.description: Public documentation explains timeline operations, the opacity keyframe model, validation commands, and future non-goals without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence: WP05 implementation commit 25e70ae updates README.md, docs/FEATURES.md, and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md; review passed in f87df2c/ee9a553 with zig build test, zig build run, CMake build, and git diff --check.
criteria.notes: Docs explicitly keep playback, render/export, full transitions, color darkroom, subtitle editing/Whisper, and packaging out of shipped scope.
